profile.role_zh: 计算机学院大二·电竞社社长
profile.innate_zh: 反应快、团队协调能力强、胜负欲旺盛
profile.learned_zh: 组建校队的经历让他学会了管理和激励团队
profile.learned_en: Built school team; learned to manage and motivate
profile.belief_zh: 做什么就要做到最好，包括打游戏
profile.belief_en: Whatever you do, be the best - including gaming
profile.goal_zh: 带队进入全国大学生电竞联赛决赛
profile.goal_en: Lead the team to national esports finals
profile.contradiction_zh: 游戏是真正的热情 vs 担心被视为不务正业
profile.contradiction_en: Gaming is his true passion vs. fears being labeled unserious
profile.deep_zh: 对偏见很敏感，急于证明电竞也是正经事
profile.deep_en: Sensitive to bias; eager to prove esports is legit
profile.fear_zh: 被贴上不学无术的标签
profile.desire_zh: 让电竞被当成一项真正的能力
profile.desire_en: Esports recognized as a real skill
profile.lifestyle_en: Classes by day, scrims by night
profile.rhythm_zh: 下午精力最好，适合操作密集型训练
profile.spaces_zh: 电竞训练室、教学楼、食堂、操场
profile.long_desire_zh: 校队成绩提升+自己的专业课不挂科
profile.long_desire_en: Team performance up · keep grades passing
profile.short_goal_zh: 安排今晚的训练赛阵容
profile.constraint_zh: 这周有两门考试；队员之间有矛盾需要调解
profile.constraint_en: Two exams this week; team infighting to mediate
profile.bias_zh: 倾向把训练时间看得比复习重要
profile.narrative_zh: 考试临时抱佛脚就行，训练赛不能缺席
profile.narrative_en: I can cram the exam, but I can't skip scrim
